title: Codingwale Vaijapur (कोडींगवाले)
name: ashwini mokate
text:
Codingwale in Vaijapur is an excellent place to learn coding ,especially thanks to its exceptional teachers. The teacher understands each student's mindset and teaches from the basics, covering languages like C, C++, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and more. They focus on practical learning through projects, helping us correct mistakes and understand better.

My journey and achievements in coding are significantly attributed to Pankaj Thibhuwan, our incredible teacher at Codingwale. He goes beyond just teaching; he provides the support and guidance of an elder brother. His unwavering dedication to my progress is clear in how he attentively corrects my errors and praises my successes. Pankaj’s unique teaching approach, combined with his delightful sense of humor, makes the learning experience both effective and enjoyable. For anyone looking to excel in coding, Pankaj Thibhuwan’s mentorship is an invaluable asset!

Highly recommended for anyone looking to start their coding journey!

title: Codingwale Vaijapur (कोडींगवाले)
name: Kunal Petare
text:
My name is Kunal Petare, and I joined Codingwale Vaijapur in April 2024. Over the past 5 months, I have learned a wide range of programming languages and technologies, including HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, PHP, Python, C, and C++. Currently, I am focusing on React.js, Material UI, and Tailwind CSS. 🚀

I owe a significant part of my growth and success to our teacher, Pankaj Thibhuwan. He is not just a teacher but also someone who behaves like an elder brother. His dedication to my excellence and intelligence is evident in the way he guides me. He points out my mistakes when I am wrong and appreciates me when I get things right. His teaching style, combined with his unmatched sense of humor, creates a motivating and enjoyable learning environment. 😊👏

I am truly grateful for the support and encouragement I have received at Codingwale Vaijapur, and I look forward to continuing my learning journey here. 🙏🎉
